passage: A is for apple. The apple is red and sweet. Ali likes apples every day.
B is for ball. The ball is round and colorful. Bilal plays with the ball.
C is for cat. The cat is soft and small. It drinks milk every morning.
D is for dog. The dog barks loudly. Daniyal plays with his dog outside.
E is for elephant. The elephant is very big and strong. It has a long trunk.
F is for fish. The fish swims in water. It has shiny fins and a tail.
G is for goat. The goat eats green grass. It lives on a farm.
H is for hen. The hen lays eggs every day. It walks around happily.
I is for ice cream. Ice cream is cold and sweet. I like chocolate flavor.
J is for juice. Juice is healthy and tasty. Sara drinks orange juice daily.
K is for kite. The kite flies high in the sky. Kamran likes flying kites.
L is for lion. The lion is brave and strong. It lives in the jungle.
M is for mango. Mango is yellow and sweet. It is my favorite fruit.
N is for nest. Birds live in nests. The nest is on the tree.
O is for orange. The orange is juicy and tasty. It is full of vitamins.
P is for parrot. The parrot is green. It can copy sounds and words.
Q is for queen. The queen wears a crown. She lives in a palace.
R is for rabbit. The rabbit is white and fluffy. It likes carrots.
S is for sun. The sun shines brightly. It gives us light and heat.
T is for tiger. The tiger has black stripes. It is a wild animal.
U is for umbrella. The umbrella protects us from rain. It is colorful.
V is for van. The van carries people and goods. It moves on the road.
W is for watch. The watch shows time. My father wears a watch.
X is for xylophone. The xylophone makes musical sounds. Children enjoy playing it.
Y is for yacht. The yacht sails on water. It is a beautiful boat.
Z is for zebra. The zebra has black and white stripes. It runs very fast.
